title: Add TrickleAwareNeighborLiveness policy struct/method
description: Define a policy struct or method on NeighborTable that factors in TrickleTimer::heard_consistent counter to avoid premature eviction of suppressed neighbors in dense networks. Reference RFC 6206 and RPL neighbor timeout considerations. Include design doc in comments.
close_reason: Implemented TrickleAwareNeighborLiveness policy method on NeighborTable with design doc referencing RFC 6206
